description: Create a PM2 ecosystem configuration file at /home/ga/ecosystem.config.js for the four Socioboard microservices (user, feeds, publish, and notification) located in /opt/socioboard/socioboard-api/. The configuration must define an apps array where each service includes a descriptive name, the correct script entry point, the absolute working directory (cwd), and an environment object with NODE_ENV set to development. Start all four services using the ecosystem file, save the PM2 process list, and export the PM2 status report to /home/ga/pm2_status.txt.
